query: Deploy our agency's ECS service across multiple availability zones with load balancing, health checks, and automated failover under the IM8 resiliency controls.
Set up auto-scaling for our agency's workload so it absorbs demand spikes without paying for idle peak capacity year-round.
Plan and script load testing against a production replica of our government e-service before the national registration window opens.
Configure AWS Backup for our agency's RDS databases and EBS volumes, with encrypted backups stored in a separate account.
Make our agency's backups immutable with S3 Object Lock so ransomware or a compromised credential can't delete them during the retention window.
Schedule and document recovery testing that proves we can fully restore our agency system's data and services within the RTO and RPO.
Draft the disaster recovery plan for our agency system: roles, per-scenario recovery procedures, communications, and RTO/RPO targets.
Our agency needs a business continuity plan and a tabletop exercise cadence to satisfy the BR controls before the audit.
An availability-zone outage took our government portal down for 40 minutes last month. Redesign the deployment so a single AZ failure doesn't cause an outage.
Help us decide what backup frequency, immutable retention period, and recovery-test cadence values to record in our agency SSP's backup parameters.
Pin our agency's data to Singapore regions, block cross-region replication, and arrange witnessed destruction of the retired storage media.
Set up SLO dashboards, golden-signal alerts, and GCSOC-forwarded security monitoring for our agency system.
Harden our agency's Kubernetes workloads: non-root containers, read-only root filesystems, image scanning, and a private registry.
Design the VPC segmentation with deny-by-default security groups and put a WAF in front of our agency service.
Add a scheduled-downtime maintenance banner and publish our agency service's operating hours per the DSS shell requirements.
Arrange an independent VAPT and continuous cloud security posture management scanning before our agency service launches.
Which System Security Plan applies to our new agency system, and which of its controls are Level 0?
Set up a nightly cron job to rsync my personal NAS to an external hard drive at home.
Add SAST, dependency scanning, and artifact signing to our agency's GitHub Actions pipeline.
Fix the SQL injection in our agency portal's login endpoint and add parameterised queries and input validation.
